latest_frozen_family.label: DISCARD_SOURCE_LINK_CROSS_BUCKET_BROAD_RESIDUAL_RISK
latest_frozen_family.reason: Cross-bucket diagnostics showed broad residual risk. The target NO|offset_60_90|risk_increasing bucket explained only 14.2373% residual cost versus the 35% KEEP target, while normalized residual and pair-tail budgets failed. Repeating the exact 3600s diagnostic would not create a new mechanism.

selected_plan.name: replay_store_v2_truth_validation_response_v1_builder
selected_plan.purpose: Build a local validator that consumes selected candidate action validation requests and emits truth_validation_response_v1 artifacts using replay_store_v2 source rows. It is not a strategy searcher and must not scan replay/raw/full stores for candidate discovery.

input_contract.format: JSONL/CSV/DuckDB table of selected candidate actions

validation_checks.name: selected_action_scope_guard
validation_checks.description: Reject requests with forbidden days, missing condition_id/action_ts_ms, or request sizes that imply broad strategy search rather than selected action validation.

validation_checks.name: pre_action_book_state_replay
validation_checks.description: For each action, use md_book_l1/md_book_l2 source rows nearest before action_ts_ms for the same day/condition/side and emit stable refs such as replay_store_v2:md_book_l2:<day>:<source_row_id>.

validation_checks.name: trade_timing_source_linkage
validation_checks.description: Use md_trades around the action/close window to link observed public market trades and timing, while keeping them separate from private owner fills.

validation_checks.name: decision_consistency
validation_checks.description: Recompute accept/block inputs from request-provided pre-inventory/budget fields plus replay book rows and compare to expected_decision.

validation_checks.name: budgeted_residual_fifo_reconstruction
validation_checks.description: Emit lot-level residual_fifo_lots rows with source action, source row refs, remaining qty/cost, close/redeem/settle linkage when request fields are sufficient.

validation_checks.name: strict_rescue_close_validation
validation_checks.description: Validate close timing, side, qty, cost, official fee, L1/L2 source rows, and trade source rows for strict second-leg rescue candidates.

validation_checks.name: fee_formula_guard
validation_checks.description: Compute fee as shares * fee_rate * price * (1 - price); fee_rate must be supplied by config/API/explicit experiment and recorded as fee_rate_source.

validation_checks.name: private_truth_guard
validation_checks.description: Never set private_truth_ready=true or promotion_gate_pass=true while own_* and user_ws_log row counts remain zero.

guardrails: Do not use replay_store_v2 to discover candidate strategies or scan broad replay state.
Do not mix public/proxy xuan_trades or xuan_activity with private owner-trade truth.
Do not hard-code account-average fee rates.
Do not output deployable=true, private_truth_ready=true, shadow_ready=true, canary_ready=true, or promotion_gate_pass=true from replay_store_v2 alone.
local_test_plan: Create a tiny synthetic validation_request fixture using one allowed day and a known condition_id/source-row window.
Run schema-only checks against replay_store_v2 and bounded source-row lookups for selected actions only.
Assert output manifest separates research_ranking from promotion_gate and remains deployable=false/private_truth_ready=false.

research_ranking.label: KEEP_REPLAY_STORE_V2_SOURCE_TRUTH_VALIDATION_PLAN_SELECTED
research_ranking.interpretation: The selected plan is concrete, local-only, and compatible with the new replay_store_v2 source-truth layer. It advances future candidate validation without claiming private truth or reviving frozen strategy mechanisms.

next_action: Implement a local no-network replay_store_v2 truth_validation_response_v1 builder/smoke that consumes selected candidate action fixtures, validates schema/day/fee/source-row guards, and emits SOURCE_TRUTH_VALIDATED_RESEARCH_ONLY or UNKNOWN/DISCARD without scanning broad replay or claiming private truth.
